gallery.heroDesc: Every smile we create is a balance of medical precision and artistic vision. Explore our documented transformations and state-of-the-art facilities.

whatsapp.title: FeRa Clinic
whatsapp.greeting: Hi there! 🌟 Welcome to FeRa Clinic. How can we help you today?

chat.welcomeMsg: Hi there! 🌟 We're so glad you're here. How can we support your smile journey today?
chat.formSuccess: Thank you! Our medical team will contact you shortly.
chat.faqQ1: Do you offer hotel and transfer?
chat.faqA1: Yes, we provide VIP airport transfers and 5-star hotel coordination for all our international patients to ensure a stress-free journey.
chat.faqQ2: How long does Hollywood Smile take?
chat.faqA2: A Hollywood Smile transformation typically takes 5 to 7 days in Istanbul, involving 2-3 clinical visits for artisanal design and placement.
chat.faqA3: Yes, initial clinical consultations and 3D treatment planning are completely free of charge at FeRa Clinic.
chat.faqA4: Costs are personalized. However, patients typically save up to 70% compared to Western prices while receiving premium Swiss-engineered materials.

hero.heroTitle: A Smile You Can Trust. A Confidence You Can Feel.
hero.heroDesc: At FeRa Clinic, we combine clinical precision with artistic design to create natural, lasting smiles — tailored to you, guided by specialists, and delivered with care.
hero.trustLine: ISO Certified • 15+ Specialist Dentists • Global Patient Hub

about.title: About FeRa Clinic
about.subtitle: We are The Smile Makers - a premier dental clinic in Istanbul dedicated to transforming lives through exceptional dental care and personalized treatment experiences.
about.storyDesc: Founded with a vision to revolutionize dental care in Turkey, FeRa Clinic brings together internationally trained specialists and Swiss-engineered technology to deliver world-class smile transformations.
about.missionDesc: To provide exceptional dental care that combines medical precision with artistic vision, creating natural, lasting smiles that enhance both health and confidence.
about.visionDesc: To become the global destination for premium dental care, where international patients receive Swiss-engineered quality with Turkish hospitality.
about.teamSubtitle: Internationally trained specialists committed to your smile transformation journey.
about.teamDesc: Our team consists of specialist dentists with advanced training from Switzerland, Germany, and Turkey, bringing global expertise to your dental care.
about.specialistsDesc: Each specialist focuses on specific dental disciplines, ensuring expert care for every treatment need.
about.technologyDesc: Swiss-engineered dental technology and 3D planning systems for precision and predictable results.
about.facilitiesDesc: State-of-the-art clinic designed for international patients, featuring advanced surgical suites and comfortable recovery areas.
about.accreditationsDesc: ISO-certified facility with international standards for safety and quality assurance.

contact.heroDesc: Have questions about treatments? Ready to start your dental journey? Our Istanbul clinic team is ready to provide expert guidance and personalized consultation.
contact.formSubtitle: Send us a message and our team will respond promptly with personalized guidance.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.successDesc: Thank you for contacting FeRa Clinic. Our team will review your inquiry and respond within 24 hours.
contact.address: Kazlıçeşme, Kennedy Cad. No:62 D:1, 34020 Zeytinburnu/İstanbul

consultation.heroDesc: Connect with our specialist dentists for expert guidance. Your personalized treatment plan begins with a confidential, comprehensive assessment.

testimonials.heroDesc: Discover authentic experiences from international patients who chose FeRa Clinic for their smile transformations. Real stories, real results.

seo.title: Patient Testimonials Istanbul | Dental Reviews Turkey | Smile Stories
seo.description: Read authentic patient testimonials and reviews for FeRa Clinic Istanbul. Real experiences from international patients about their dental transformations.

testimonials.featuredDesc: Life-changing smile transformations from around the world, made possible by FeRa Clinic's expert dental team.

t1.name: Sarah Johnson
t1.quote: The Hollywood Smile transformation exceeded all my expectations. The team's attention to detail and the final result are absolutely remarkable.

t2.name: Michael Schmidt
t2.quote: Professional, caring, and exceptional results. My new smile has given me confidence I never had before.

t3.name: Giulia Rossi
t3.quote: From consultation to final result, everything was perfect. The clinic facilities are world-class.

t4.name: Pierre Dubois
t4.quote: The best dental experience I've ever had. The team truly cares about patient comfort and results.

t5.name: Jennifer Smith
t5.quote: FeRa Clinic combines medical excellence with artistic vision. My smile transformation is natural and beautiful.

t6.name: Ahmet Yılmaz
t6.quote: Outstanding care from start to finish. The international patient support made everything easy.

testimonials.ctaDesc: Ready to transform your smile? Read more inspiring stories from our satisfied patients and contact us for your personalized consultation.
